allow: Bash(printf '\\r\\n.pn-port-info-wrap {\\r\\n  position: relative;\\r\\n  display: flex;\\r\\n  align-items: center;\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\n.pn-port-info-btn {\\r\\n  width: 16px;\\r\\n  height: 16px;\\r\\n  border-radius: 50%%;\\r\\n  border: 1.5px solid #bbbbbb;\\r\\n  background: transparent;\\r\\n  color: #888888;\\r\\n  font-size: 10px;\\r\\n  font-weight: 700;\\r\\n  font-style: italic;\\r\\n  font-family: Georgia, serif;\\r\\n  cursor: pointer;\\r\\n  display: flex;\\r\\n  align-items: center;\\r\\n  justify-content: center;\\r\\n  padding: 0;\\r\\n  line-height: 1;\\r\\n  flex-shrink: 0;\\r\\n  transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, background 0.15s;\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\n.pn-port-info-btn:hover {\\r\\n  border-color: #555555;\\r\\n  color: #333333;\\r\\n  background: rgba\(0, 0, 0, 0.05\);\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\n.pn-port-tooltip {\\r\\n  position: absolute;\\r\\n  left: 24px;\\r\\n  top: 50%%;\\r\\n  transform: translateY\(-50%%\);\\r\\n  z-index: 100;\\r\\n  background: #ffffff;\\r\\n  border: 1px solid rgba\(0, 0, 0, 0.12\);\\r\\n  border-radius: 8px;\\r\\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba\(0, 0, 0, 0.12\);\\r\\n  padding: 10px 13px;\\r\\n  width: 280px;\\r\\n  pointer-events: none;\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\n.pn-port-tooltip-title {\\r\\n  font-size: 12px;\\r\\n  font-weight: 600;\\r\\n  color: #111111;\\r\\n  margin-bottom: 5px;\\r\\n}\\r\\n\\r\\n.pn-port-tooltip-text {\\r\\n  font-size: 12px;\\r\\n  color: #555555;\\r\\n  line-height: 1.5;\\r\\n}\\r\\n')
